scope_note: QA UHG Orbit Diagonal Profile Cert family [233]: packages the pre-verified m=9 QA T-orbit partition under T(b,e)=((b+e-1) mod 9)+1 and step (b,e)->(T(b,e),T(e,T(b,e))). The 81 points partition as 1 singularity of length 1, 2 satellite orbits of length 4, and 6 cosmos orbits of length 12. Every non-singular D_1-containing orbit contains exactly two D_1 points, and those points sum to (9,9): Sat#1 (3,3)+(6,6), Cos#1 (1,1)+(8,8), Cos#3 (2,2)+(7,7), Cos#4 (5,5)+(4,4).
